sections.paragraph:
Jehu, pr.n. (perhaps i.q. יְהֹוהוּא [“for יְהֵי הוּא”] “Jehovah is He,” like יֵשׁוּעַ for יְהֹושׁוּעַ).-

(1) of a king of Israel, who, after exterminating the dynasty of Ahab, held the kingdom from 844-56, B.C.; he was very much opposed to [some kinds of] idolatry, but very cruel, 2 Ki. chap. and 10 .-(2) of a prophet living in the kingdom of Israel, in the time of Baasha, 1Ki 16:1 2Ch 19:2 20:34 .-(3) of others of little note.
